name: Texas Farm Credit
description_short: Texas Farm Credit's San Antonio branch provides agricultural loans, land financing, and home mortgages for rural and agribusiness customers across Texas.
description_long:
Texas Farm Credit is a specialized lender with a San Antonio branch located at 3519 Paesanos Parkway, Suite 105, serving Bexar, Gonzales, Wilson, and Guadalupe counties. The organization has been operating since at least 2016 and focuses specifically on rural, agricultural, and agribusiness financing needs rather than conventional consumer lending.

The San Antonio branch offers four primary service categories: Agriculture Loans for farms, ranches, equipment, and livestock financing; Home Loans for recreational property, weekend retreats, and hunting ranches; Land Loans for purchasing, building, or refinancing properties on land throughout Texas; and Insurance Programs covering crops, pasture, livestock, and family protection. Their team includes a VP Branch Manager, Relationship Manager, Senior Loan Administrator, and Senior Mortgage Loan Originator.

The company distinguishes itself through deep agricultural expertise and a team with personal roots in ranching and rural communities. Staff members hold professional certifications (Texas Alliance of Land Brokers Association, American Association of Professional Landmen) and bring relevant experience—including one loan officer with ranch and rodeo industry background. Customer testimonials highlight fast processing, personalized service, and loan officers going "above and beyond" to facilitate transactions.

However, Texas Farm Credit is a specialized agricultural lender, not a full-service mortgage bank. Their target market is primarily agribusiness operators, rural property owners, and people with connections to agricultural operations. Prospective borrowers seeking conventional mortgages in urban areas or those without agricultural/rural property needs may find more suitable options elsewhere. Hours are limited to Monday-Friday, 8am-4:30pm, with no weekend availability.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Specialized expertise in agricultural, ranch, and rural property financing across Texas
Team members hold professional certifications including Texas Alliance of Land Brokers Association membership
Flexible financing available for various property types: farms, ranches, recreational land, and hunting properties
Quick loan processing and closing timelines per customer testimonials
Combined mortgage and insurance offerings (crop, pasture, livestock coverage)
Relationship-based service model with named loan officers providing personalized attention
Financing available for properties of any size throughout Texas, not just San Antonio area
cons: Limited to specialized agricultural and rural market—not suitable for conventional urban home buyers
Office hours restricted to Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm with no weekend availability
Geographically focused on Texas only; no national lending presence
Small branch team may limit availability or loan volume capacity compared to major lenders
Minimum loan requirements and qualification criteria likely favor established agricultural operations over first-time rural buyers
best_for: Farm and ranch operators seeking agricultural production loans and equipment financing
Rural property buyers purchasing land, ranches, or recreational properties in Texas
Agribusiness owners refinancing existing agricultural operations or expanding holdings
Hunters and recreational property owners financing weekend retreats and hunting ranches
diagnosis: Texas Farm Credit is ideal for agricultural operators, ranch owners, and rural property buyers in Texas seeking specialized financing tailored to farming and ranching operations. The main caveat is that this is a niche lender focused exclusively on agricultural and rural markets—conventional homebuyers in urban areas or those without agricultural ties should explore broader mortgage lenders.
services: Agricultural production loans for farms and ranches
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 3519 Paesanos Pkwy Suite 105, San Antonio, TX 78231
